titleEn: New software update for the Egg Tester Ultimate™ and Egg Tester Plus™
titleZh: ORKA食品科技发布蛋品测试仪软件更新，提升蛋黄颜色测量精度
summaryZh: ORKA食品科技宣布为Egg Tester Ultimate™和Egg Tester Plus™推出软件更新，将蛋黄颜色测量从整数级（1-16）提升至小数点后一位（如2.6、8.7），实现更高分辨率。该更新使研究人员、饲料制造商、家禽生产商和质量控制专业人员能够更精细地检测和分析蛋黄颜色细微差异，有助于优化饲料配方和蛋品分级。
featuredReason: 该软件更新通过数字化、高精度的蛋黄颜色测量，为智慧畜牧中的蛋品质量自动化检测提供了实用工具，有助于饲料配方优化和蛋品分级标准化。
contentFull: Processing Product quality and safety Egg quality New software update for the Egg Tester Ultimate™ and Egg Tester Plus™ Higher-resolution yolk color measurement 8 June 2026 1 minute read By: Laurence Williams ORKA Food Technology is pleased to announce a new software update for the Egg Tester Ultimate™ and Egg Tester Plus™ that provides enhanced yolk color measurement precision.Previously, yolk color values were displayed as whole numbers (1–16) based on the DSM Yolk Color Fan. With the latest software update, yolk color measurements are now displayed with decimal precision (e.g., 2.6, 3.2, 8.7), enabling finer differentiation between samples and improved monitoring of subtle color variations.This enhanced resolution allows researchers, feed manufacturers, poultry producers, and quality-control professionals to detect and analyze small yolk color differences that were previously grouped into the same score.For more information, please contact us at [email protected] or visit https://eggtester.com/Egg Tester UltimateEgg Tester Plus Sponsored Article ORKA Food Technology Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International Laurence Williams More from this author More News View all Chicken sticks enter US snack market as turkey output falls Markets & policy Market trends 2 July 2026 1 minute read WOAH reports 2.16 million birds lost to HPAI in May Health & disease Diseases Avian influenza 1 July 2026 1 minute read Europe worst affected as outbreaks spread across seven countries Canadian firms launch world's earliest in-ovo egg sexing system In-ovo sexing 1 July 2026 1 minute read Hyperspectral technology determines sex from day four of incubation Sponsored Article ORKA Food Technology Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International
translationZh:
ORKA食品科技很高兴地宣布为Egg Tester Ultimate™和Egg Tester Plus™推出新的软件更新，该更新提供了增强的蛋黄颜色测量精度。

此前，蛋黄颜色值基于DSM蛋黄比色扇以整数（1-16）显示。通过最新的软件更新，蛋黄颜色测量现在以小数精度显示（例如2.6、3.2、8.7），从而能够更精细地区分样本，并更好地监测微妙的颜色变化。

这种增强的分辨率使研究人员、饲料制造商、家禽生产商和质量控制专业人员能够检测和分析以前被归为同一分数的微小蛋黄颜色差异。

如需更多信息，请通过[email protected]联系我们，或访问https://eggtester.com/
contentHtml:
New software update for the Egg Tester Ultimate™ and Egg Tester Plus™ 
Higher-resolution yolk color measurement
